misc: Making a comeback after a few years' hiatus from Hector Trophée events by returning to Konopiště and competing in Hector Trophée 2026.
Did participate in the 2025 Matchplay series.
biography: Hailing from Master Golf Club, Kristian is poised to make a highly anticipated return to the Hector Trophée 2026, marking his fourth appearance in this distinguished pair competition. After a hiatus of several years from the main event, his decision to compete once more at Konopiště signals a profound rekindling of his competitive drive within this annual showcase.

Across his three previous participations, Kristian has consistently demonstrated a committed approach to the challenging fairways. While the illustrious pair's trophy and the premier individual honor have, to date, remained just beyond his grasp, his unwavering presence in past editions has firmly established him as a dedicated figure within the tournament's evolving narrative.

Kristian's competitive spirit was clearly reignited prior to his Hector Trophée comeback, notably evidenced by his appearance in the 2025 Matchplay series. This engagement underscores a player who values strategic play and head-to-head competition. As he steps back onto the Hector Trophée stage, Kristian remains an active participant in Hector events, bringing with him a blend of experience and a fresh ambition for victory, promising to add a compelling chapter to his tournament journey.
